case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. SANDRA NETTE AGEE

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00) SERVED SEP-30-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT AGEE, SANDRA NETTE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT NARALLANA SANCHEZ LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT SANDRA NETTE AGEE IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT AGEE, SANDRA NETTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-18-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
